cloud_function.description: Specifies the Cloud Function to which the IAM binding will be applied. Must be provided in the format 'projects/{project}/locations/{location}/functions/{function}'.

condition.description: Defines an IAM condition for the Cloud Function IAM binding, specifying requirements that must be met for the policy binding to be applicable.

members.description: List of identities to which the IAM binding will be applied, including users, groups, and service accounts.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to be applied to the Cloud Function, such as 'roles/cloudfunctions.invoker'.
